title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Shaadi.com Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Shaadi.com Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shaadi.com Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
